# Contributing to Cal AI

Thank you for your interest in contributing to Cal AI! We welcome contributions from everyone. This document provides guidelines and instructions for contributing.

## Repository

The main repository is hosted at: [ovishkh/Cal AI](https://github.com/ovishkh/Cal AI)

## How to Contribute

### Getting Started

1. Fork the repository on GitHub
2. Clone your forked repository locally
3. Create a new branch for your feature or fix

```bash
git clone https://github.com/your-username/Cal AI.git
cd Cal AI
git checkout -b feature/your-feature-name
```

### Development Setup

1. Ensure you have Flutter installed (version 3.7.2 or higher)
2. Install dependencies:
   ```bash
   flutter pub get
   ```
3. Run the app:
   ```bash
   flutter run
   ```

### Making Changes

1. Follow the existing code style and conventions
2. Write clear commit messages
3. Ensure your code doesn't break existing tests
4. Add tests for new features when applicable
5. Keep your commits focused and atomic

### Submitting Pull Requests

1. Push your branch to your forked repository
2. Create a pull request against the main repository
3. Provide a clear description of your changes
4. Reference any related issues using GitHub's issue linking syntax
5. Ensure CI/CD checks pass

#### PR Title Format

Use clear, descriptive titles for your pull requests:

- `feat: add voice input for recipes`
- `fix: correct meal plan calculation`
- `docs: update API documentation`
- `refactor: improve code structure`

### Code Standards

- Follow Dart formatting standards
- Use meaningful variable and function names
- Add comments for complex logic
- Ensure code is properly formatted using `flutter format`

### Reporting Issues

When reporting issues:

1. Check if the issue already exists
2. Provide a clear title and description
3. Include steps to reproduce
4. Add relevant screenshots or error messages
5. Specify your environment (Flutter version, OS, device)

## Code of Conduct

We are committed to providing a welcoming and inspiring community. Please read our [CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md) to understand our community standards.

## License

By contributing to Cal AI, you agree that your contributions will be licensed under the same license as the project.

## Questions?

Feel free to reach out to the maintainers 
or create a discussion issue for questions about contributing.

Thank you for contributing to Cal AI!
